<|14.58|> When Brother Harold reached the bottom of the grave,<|17.24|> <|17.24|> I could see his brother Monk almost tuck him in for rest.<|22.30|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Truth be told, it was disconcerting to see a human body, not a body in a casket, but simply a body, be buried.<|12.00|> <|12.00|> But never before had
